title: get_oracc_text data payload
description: Structured payload for the `get_oracc_text` tool. ORACC TEI XML edition rendered into typed transliteration lines and translation blocks. `found=false` when the UPenn mirror returns 200 + empty body (its 404 substitute).

title.description: Edition title as parsed from the TEI header.

cdli_id.description: Cross-reference into CDLI when the TEI header records one. May equal `text_id` (ORACC and CDLI sometimes share P-numbers).

items.description: Rendered transliteration line. ORACC TEI numbers lines via `<lb n="N"/>` and words via `<w lemma>` — both fold into the string form here.
One translation `<div3 type="tr">` block, flattened to plain text.
